Property.Description: An than voi tat ca ke dich xung quanh

Property.Description: Tan cong muc tieu se bi phan <color=#ffff1a>%s%%<color> sat thuong

Property.Description: Cach moi <color=#ffff1a>%s giay<color> bo qua nua giay tan cong

Property.Description: Xoa gian cach thi trien cua tat ca vo cong

Property.Name: magic_rdclifewithdis
Property.Description: Moi nua giay, can cu khoang cach da dich chuyen so voi lan truoc do, gay sat thuong phat huy luc tan cong co ban <color=#ffff1a>%s%% * khoang cach dich chuyen<color>, toi da khoang cach moi lan <color=#ffff1a>%s<color>.

Property.Description: Moi lan co them 1 ke dich xung quanh pham vi <color=#ffff1a>%s<color> se tang cac thuoc tinh sau, cong don toi da <color=#ffff1a>%s<color> hieu qua:

Property.Name: magic_trice_eff_stealstate
Property.Description: Lien tuc trong suot thoi gian duy tri trang thai nay, co ty le <color=#ffff1a>%s%%<color> ngau nhien danh cap toi da <color=#ffff1a>%s<color> trang thai ho tro cua ke dich khong phai quai vat, sau do thi trien trang thai danh cap duoc tuong ung toi da <color=#ffff1a>cap %s<color> cho muc tieu la ban than hoac dong doi.
